base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of town_tileset — a tile from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Town atlas — cobblestone streets, brick walls, wooden house planks, shop signs, church doors, windows, pillars, village-well. Used across 8 towns with palette-swap per town. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Town atlas — cobblestone streets, brick walls, wooden house planks, shop signs, church doors, windows, pillars, village-well. Used across 8 towns with palette-swap per town
